description:
Offered: Fall
The course specializes in 4 x 5 view camera analog photography. Pre-visualization and the use of the Zone System is introduced for a direct manipulation of tonal range and image detail through an exploration of advanced exposure and development techniques. Students will gain an appreciation of the inherent flexibility of the view camera’s adjustments, approaching photography through a more refined control over image perspective, focus and detail.
Prerequisite(s): COMM 1600
Note: Students are responsible for paper and film supplies.
